With BETA1 (not BETA2) the following was okay!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
I have checked disc1: sha256 </dev/acd0: OKAY
I have checked the harddisk with IBM-DFT tool: OKAY (Advanced Test)
See bug: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=bin/103791
=============================================================================
